horoscope: Especially regarding money matters and practical affairs, you're coming to clear ideas and decisions, dear Aries, with the Sun and Mercury aligning in your resources sector. The new insights, ideas, and perspectives emerging now and this week can be significant. Helpful information can come into your life or is now ready for processing, organizing, and sorting. There can be a turning point or the fruition of a project first considered in early March, or new developments arise related to an issue from around that date. Building your sense of security feels exceptionally good right now. You're adding special touches to your endeavors or activities.

The Sun and Mercury meet in your sign today, dear Taurus, and your words are heard loud and clear, so be sure they represent you well! You may feel compelled to express your ideas and make an impact now. Instead, others are seeking your opinion, or you’re the topic of the moment. There may be an epiphany or culmination of a project now, and you’re able to see details you overlooked in the past. An idea that was born in early March can now blossom, and a decision is imminent. Clarity on a matter is likely to come, and after some wavering on an issue, you’re happy to be “in the know.” Verbalizing your desires can be sharp and clear. Others are drawn to your healing energy, and you could be in a position to soothe, comfort, or otherwise care for someone.

Much is happening under the hood today, dear Gemini, and it can be highly enlightening! The Sun and Mercury align in your soul sector, which can prompt you to verbalize, analyze, or sort out a private matter or a lingering problem. Writing your thoughts and seeing them in words can give them new life and energy, helping you understand an issue in a new way and thus getting you closer to a resolution or decision. Revealing conversations or details emerging can prompt a turning point of sorts now. You may be in a better position to communicate or rationalize a matter that, before today, was difficult to express or understand. An inkling of a plan or idea around early March may now blossom. Today’s transits stir the feeling that communicating will help solve problems. Still, you may be relishing private time.

Today's Mercury-Sun alignment can help clarify a matter for you, dear Cancer, mainly related to friendship, special plans or dreams, or a pet project. Alternatively, this can be a time of further developments on an initiative from early March that is now beginning to gain traction and blossom. Today is helpful for seeing a plan or friendship with greater clarity. Friends have something important to contribute or say right now, or you're playing with emerging ideas for long-term ventures and projects. Today is strong for putting extra effort into making a connection or a contribution. Joining with someone or a group may figure strongly now, and it can be quite useful and even instructive. A sense of belonging in a group setting can provide you with a wonderful feeling, or you can thoroughly enjoy pouring more love and heart into a special pursuit.

Mercury and the Sun align in your solar tenth house today, dear Leo, helping you see career and life path goals or professional matters and responsibilities more clearly, or at least in a balanced, logical way. Verbalizing your thoughts on paper, a device, or orally can be particularly useful, bringing plans to life and helping you make a decision or understand things more fully. Your powers of reasoning are mighty right now, and there can be meaningful conversations or communications occurring that help you turn a corner. Communication can be lively, stimulating, and refreshingly open. You can tackle serious and practical topics with as much ease as you shoot the breeze about lighthearted material. You can also feel more fulfilled by putting extra love into a special pursuit or goal right now.

Creative energy is with you for promotion and publicity today, dear Virgo, as well as for learning new things and increasing your knowledge. Personal interests are rich, and you're ready to throw yourself into them. The Sun and Mercury align today, taking you to a peak or turning point on a mental level. Illumination or at least increased mental clarity is in store, giving you a new perspective on your life. Conversations, news, and thoughts are significant, helping you clear up misconceptions, confusion, or uncertainty. Now is the time when plans form or come together, mainly related to your communications, studies, personal interests, or travel. There can be strong motivation to share your work, ideas, or beliefs now and this week. There can be a real buzz of ideas with you today, and blanks fill in, or an important piece of information can arrive that completes a picture.

There is a pleasant, creative focus on your intimate or financial life today, dear Libra, and these energies are quite logical or verbal. The Sun and Mercury meet in your solar eighth house, and you may see an intimate relationship or financial issue more clearly now. You can gain new insight into your motivations or what makes a particular person in your life tick. Solving a mystery can be rewarding, or you might have an illuminating discussion about a matter that was previously hidden, kept under wraps, or especially complicated. Playing around with ideas becomes an enjoyable, lighthearted experience. It’s not so much a time for deep connections as it is for examining deeper issues with greater objectivity and reason. In fact, detaching yourself just enough from emotions can be beneficial from time to time, and this exercise is especially valuable today. You might also pour special attention into a pet project or a connection.

This can be a rewarding and satisfying day for communicating and connecting, dear Scorpio. Transits boost your relationships, promoting good, healthy relations with a partner or benefits to pairing up. You can feel supported, protected, or nurtured by someone important to you, or you may be the one doing the nurturing, particularly on a mental level. Mercury and the Sun align in the sign opposite yours today, and mental energy is intense and in the spotlight. You’re logical and creative at once with a partner or about your relationship needs, and it’s a rare combination. You may be sorting and organizing your thoughts and ideas, and interactions or conversations with someone can help jumpstart critical thinking. Whether verbalizing a matter to someone helps you see the issue more clearly or leads you to an important conclusion about a relationship, this is an enlightening time. An idea or plan comes to fruition. Some emotional detachment can be pretty pleasant and immensely helpful now.

You’re well-positioned to learn something handy for improving your work, services, business, or health, dear Sagittarius. The Sun and Mercury meet in your solar sixth house, and you’re in fine shape for making plans and lists, editing, refining, and talking things through with co-workers or people with whom you spend a lot of time. Giving voice to your thoughts and ideas or even writing or typing them out can help you see things more clearly and objectively. Some clarity arrives today, particularly as you sort out your feelings and needs. Communication can help center you and relieve your mind regarding your troubles or concerns. It can also be a great time to apply yourself to work or chores and organize your personal environment. You're putting more love into your work or self-care pursuits now. Interactions with others tend to be warm and helpful.

You're in an excellent position for creative ideas and satisfaction today, dear Capricorn, and for expressing affection and concern. You also seem to be at your best when you're pursuing what makes you happy. Putting extra care into a creative project or relationship can be rewarding now. Today's Sun-Mercury alignment frames you well, and it helps you get a point across if you need to. This influence can also aid clarity on a matter, push a plan forward, or facilitate a decision. This can be a time to gain some clarity about a creative project, a relationship, or a hobby. You’re taking more pride in your work, ideas, and beliefs. Creative projects could reach a turning point, or there can be a romantic revelation that relates to a matter that has been developing since early March. Observations you make now are likely to be significant, and assessing recent ideas can be very successful. You can find yourself more and more engaged on a mental level, and you are articulate and feeling more dramatic right now.

With today's transits, you're striving for more clarity and decisiveness, dear Aquarius. It can be a time for meaningful conversations with or about family. As the Sun and Mercury align in your solar fourth house, home or family plans may similarly come together. Ideas can blossom now, particularly about domestic and relationship matters. It’s a good idea to use this radiant energy to make plans, solve problems, and handle details. Analyzing emotional issues can sometimes take you away from your feelings a little too far, but today, it can be a useful exercise. Significant ideas, news, or conversations can emerge now. Sharing memories, personal feelings, and thoughts can be rewarding now. You might also find creative solutions to family or home-related problems.

Your special interests and projects help fuel your enthusiasm and motivation, dear Pisces. People around you appreciate your natural personal style more than usual. You're also in great shape for learning and enjoying it as you do. Making important links and connections can figure strongly, and conversations can be warm and helpful. You tend to bring more love and special attention to your projects, personal interests, or communications. This can be a mentally busy day and a potentially illuminating time. It’s a good idea to pay extra attention to details, news, and ideas presented now and this week, with the Sun and Mercury joining forces in your communications sector. It’s a personal matter for you, even if the energy is on the logical, intellectual side, as it relates to an idea that first formed in March when the Sun and Mercury were in your sign. You might realize or decide something now, and it’s satisfying! Significant decisions can result from today’s conversations.
